Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters

Enum Class PoliticalActor.Education

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PoliticalActor.Education>
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.PoliticalActor.Education
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PoliticalActor.Education>, Constable
Enclosing class:
PoliticalActor
public static enum PoliticalActor.Education extends Enum<PoliticalActor.Education>
Enum for Education levels, based on ISCED 9-level framework.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • EARLY_CHILDHOOD

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education EARLY_CHILDHOOD
      0

      Early Childhood Education: For children younger than three years through Preschool or Kindergarden.

    • PRIMARY

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education PRIMARY
      1

      Primary Education: Core knowledge in Reading, Writing, and Mathematics. Elementary School (K/1 - 5/6).

    • LOWER_SECONDARY

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education LOWER_SECONDARY
      2

      Lower Secondary Education: English, Science, Social Studies, and Algebra. Middle School (5/6 - 8/9)

    • UPPER_SECONDARY

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education UPPER_SECONDARY
      3

      Upper Secondary Education: Language, Political Science, Higher Sciences, Higher Mathematics. High School (9 - 12)

    • POST_SECONDARY

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education POST_SECONDARY
      4

      Post-Secondary Non-Tertiary Education: Vocational or Technical Skills, Certifications.

    • SHORT_TERTIARY

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education SHORT_TERTIARY
      5

      Short-Cycle Tertiary Education: Any amount of a practically-based occupationally-specific concentrated education program.

    • BACHELORS

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education BACHELORS
      6

      Bachelor's Degree or Equivalent: Intermediate academic or professional knowledge, skills, and competencies.

    • MASTERS

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education MASTERS
      7

      Master's Degree or Equivalent: Advanced academic or professional knowledge, skills, and competencies.

    • DOCTORAL

      public static final PoliticalActor.Education DOCTORAL
      8

      Doctorate or Equivalent: Advanced research qualification, usually with submission and defense of a substantive dissertation.

    • valueOf

      public static PoliticalActor.Education valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
